overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Star Wars Outlaws showing the protagonist Kay Vess walking through an industrial maintenance facility, exiting to an outdoor docking bay at night, and boarding her spaceship. The clip transitions from dimly lit interior corridors with pipes and machinery to an open desert docking bay under a starry sky, ending inside the ship's cargo hold.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with overhead piping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow industrial corridors, passing control panels and piping systems

entered.detail: large rusted pipes running along walls and ceiling with valve controls
wall-mounted panels with glowing buttons and screens
exposed brick texture on corridor walls
industrial shelving units with various equipment

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow industrial corridor with exposed piping and brick walls. The character walks forward past control panels and metal shelving units in a dimly lit maintenance area with concrete floors.

events.description: passes through large arched doorway into a wider storage room

agents.ego_description: walking through arched interior halls, passing storage areas and wall-mounted lights

entered.detail: large rounded archway with brick trim leading to next room
stacked wooden and metal cargo crates
large object covered with beige tarpaulin sheeting

segments.scene_description: The character moves through arched doorways into a more open storage hall with wall sconces providing warm lighting. The space features covered vehicles, storage crates, and continues the industrial theme with visible piping now overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: final interior approach to docking bay exit

events.description: approaching exit doorway reveals bright exterior light from docking bay

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit doorway, preparing to leave the building

entered.detail: large metal doorway with orange trim leading outside
metal barrels stacked near the exit

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the final interior hall toward the exit, passing stacked barrels and covered equipment. The exit doorway becomes visible ahead, showing a glimpse of the bright exterior docking bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert docking bay with parked starship

events.description: exits industrial building into open outdoor docking bay under night sky
begins ascending the cargo ramp into the spaceship

agents.ego_description: walking across the docking bay toward the large spaceship, then ascending the cargo ramp

entered.detail: large weathered starship with distinctive cockpit and engine sections
curved concrete walls of the docking bay with illuminated windows
dark blue starry sky visible above the docking bay
extended loading ramp leading into the ship's interior

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the building into a vast open docking bay under a night sky. The massive Trailblazer spaceship dominates the center of the bay. The character walks across the sandy ground and begins ascending the ship's cargo ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship cargo hold and interior corridor

events.description: enters the spaceship interior from the cargo ramp

agents.ego_description: walking up the cargo ramp and into the ship's interior corridor

entered.detail: narrow metal corridor with overhead pipes and lighting
doorway with red emergency lighting at the end of the corridor
grated metal flooring in the cargo hold area

segments.scene_description: The character enters the spaceship's interior, walking up the cargo ramp into a narrow corridor with metal grating floors and overhead pipes. The space is lit with artificial lighting, with a red-lit doorway visible at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of an industrial maintenance facility out into a vast desert docking bay and finally into the interior of a spaceship. It begins in a narrow, dimly lit corridor of brick and exposed piping, moving past control panels and metal shelving on concrete floors. As the character passes through arched doorways, the space expands into a warmer, open storage hall filled with covered vehicles and crates before shifting toward a bright exit doorway. The scene then opens completely as the character emerges into the night air of a sandy docking bay, where the massive Trailblazer spaceship dominates the horizon. Finally, the camera follows the ascent up the ship's cargo ramp, transitioning from the open starlight back into a narrow, artificially lit interior corridor with metal grating floors and a red-lit doorway ahead.
